How to Prepare Your Child for a Lab Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
Why would my child need a lab test? 
A laboratory (lab) test is a procedure in which a health care provider takes a sample of blood , urine , or other body fluid or tissue. The tests can provide important information about your child's health. They may be used to diagnose, screen for , or mo
